summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 43 pytest tests passed. Additionally, authenticated endpoint tests (test_authenticated.py, test_appointment_actions.py, test_cash_register.py) were run as standalone scripts with 100% success. All requested features were verified working.

test_credentials.note: Test user and session created directly in database for authenticated endpoint testing

seed_data_creation: Created test barber user (test_barber@testing.com) and session for authenticated endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are working correctly. Test files created in /app/backend/tests/ can be reused for regression testing. Authenticated tests require running test_authenticated.py first to create the test session.

tested_features.health_check: PASS - GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status
tested_features.products_list: PASS - GET /api/products/ returns products list without auth
tested_features.appointment_confirm: PASS - POST /api/appointments/{id}/confirm works with auth, triggers WhatsApp notification
tested_features.product_sell: PASS - POST /api/products/{id}/sell saves ProductSale record and reduces stock
tested_features.appointments_with_service_info: PASS - GET /api/appointments/ returns service_name and service_price fields

mocked_apis_note: WhatsApp Business API (send_whatsapp_message) is MOCKED - will fail gracefully without real Meta API credentials but logs attempts correctly
